evidence: "I thought this was a horror movie (which I like)"
"I'm a horror fan from way back"
"it's deeper than that. A very good story, well acted, deep."
"The action was suspenseful and emotional...some of it was gut wrenching and difficult to watch."
"I was really interested to see where this story was going."
"A good plot, well acted (relatable and likable characters) great effects."
"For an independent film, the production value was good."
"My husband and I are big Coen brothers fans."
"I love Michael Connelly books and I loved this pilot."
"This movie made you come as close to feeling - through a film - what it feels like to be completely at another's mercy..."
"The situations that occur have caused lots of debate and commentary in our house."
"This movie was painful for me because of my experience and enforced how strong people are that face these situations."
"The horror in this movie is horrific because this is real stuff that could happen."

summary: The user has a strong preference for horror, drama, and thriller genres, appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They value emotional resonance in films, often reflecting on personal experiences, and enjoy fast-paced storytelling that captivates their attention.
